lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The body has significant rust and several large dents. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to the engine and transmission. The interior is heavily worn with significant damage.
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections, and the interior is clean with limited signs of use. All mechanical components are currently in proper working order.

Experience driving perfection with this stunning, like-new vehicle! It is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously cared for to maintain its flawless appearance and performance. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle that looks and feels like it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be roadworthy. The engine has several noticeable oil leaks and runs roughly, suggesting it needs significant mechanical work. The exterior has multiple dents, scratches, and some rust spots, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear, including torn upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. It is being sold as-is, and I recommend a thorough inspection by a mechanic before purchase. This would be a project car for someone with the time and resources to restore it.

This vehicle is in fair condition, having served as a reliable daily driver for many years. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a few small door dings, and some fading in the clear coat on the hood. Inside, the upholstery has some visible wear and a small tear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it may require some routine maintenance soon to keep it in top shape. It's a solid choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle at an affordable price point who doesn't mind a bit of cosmetic character.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, the vehicle maintains a standard of excellence consistent with its history of responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the refined driving dynamics of this exceptional specimen.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and it’s been such a joy to own. This car is in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable ride without the brand-new price tag. It runs beautifully and is ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home.

Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin boasts premium leather upholstery in excellent shape, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of regular synthetic oil changes and a recent brake service. It drives straight and true, offering a firm yet comfortable ride. While it shows the expected signs of light use, it remains a standout example of pride in ownership. Ready for its next chapter with a fresh detail and a full tank of gas.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model delivers a refined and dependable driving experience. Every aspect of its performance has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and long-term value. We invite you to experience the superior engineering and lasting quality of this exceptional offering.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to quality and consistent care, ensuring both reliability and prestige for its next owner.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape—super reliable and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks and feels great on the road. I've priced it to sell, so come take it for a spin!
Experience the pinnacle of mid-engine balance with this 3.4L flat-six powerhouse. This example features the sought-after 6-speed manual transaxle, offering precise
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior and exterior. Runs smoothly. Recent inspection passed.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior remains striking with its deep metallic finish, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use like small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium leather upholstery is supple and clean, with only slight softening on the driver’s side bolster. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It has followed a rigorous service schedule, with a recent comprehensive inspection, fresh synthetic oil change, and a brake pad replacement performed within the last 3,000 miles. The tires offer plenty of life for the seasons ahead. Included are two sets of keys and a complete folder of maintenance receipts. It is a solid, dependable, and beautiful example that is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, it presents in commendable condition, ensuring a premium driving experience for the discerning owner. Its well-preserved interior and mechanical integrity represent an exceptional value proposition within its class.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in excellent mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and reliability. A truly dependable investment for those who value both performance and longevity.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride and it's looking for a new home. This car has been so good to me—super reliable and still looks fantastic on the road! It’s been well-maintained and drives like a dream. It's the perfect find for someone who wants a solid, stylish vehicle that's ready for many more adventures. Come take it for a spin, I just know you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain remains robust with recent VANOS adjustment and a reinforced rear subframe to address common chassis fatigue. The suspension utilizes a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup, providing exceptional lateral grip and feedback. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the car exhibits minor cosmetic patina consistent with its driver-focused history but remains mechanically sharp. Recent fluid analysis confirms excellent compression across all cylinders, making this a prime example for the spirited driver.
Used car in good condition. Engine runs smooth. Interior is clean. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and style with this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle. Finished in a timeless palette, the exterior boasts a vibrant shine with only the slightest evidence of careful road use. The interior is a sanctuary of comfort, featuring pristine upholstery and a full suite of operational high-end features. Under the hood, the engine runs flawlessly, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance. This car offers a smooth, quiet ride and a level of mechanical integrity that provides immediate peace of mind. It is a turn-key opportunity for a discerning driver who values quality and care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Presented in commendable mechanical and aesthetic order, it features a refined interior and a comprehensive suite of modern amenities. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile ensures a dependable and sophisticated driving experience, reflecting a history of responsible ownership and consistent care.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a refined driving experience that balances proven performance with exceptional value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure long-term reliability, this selection stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains prepared for immediate, high-level service.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been absolute gold to own! It’s in really great shape, super clean inside, and drives like a dream. It’s perfect for anyone who wants a solid, well-loved vehicle that’s been looked after. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies and metallic rasp. The mechanical integrity is bolstered by a comprehensive VANOS service and documented subframe reinforcement, critical for maintaining chassis rigidity. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional corner-exit traction. The suspension features upgraded bushings and refreshed dampers, preserving the communicative steering rack and balanced weight distribution. While it shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain remains robust and the atmospheric induction provides a visceral analog experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, complemented by well-preserved alloy wheels and only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful road use. Inside, you'll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery, premium sound, and a fully functional suite of modern technology. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, boasting a complete service history and a recently completed multi-point inspection. It drives smoothly, shifts effortlessly, and sits on a set of high-quality tires with significant tread remaining. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality ride that has been treated with genuine care by a detail-oriented owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior standard of automotive care and mechanical integrity. This selection offers a refined driving experience, characterized by a well-preserved interior and consistent performance across all systems. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the vehicle stands as a testament to durability and sophisticated engineering. It represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both reliability and prestige in their next acquisition.
